title: IntangibleItemFrames
description: Makes item frames intangible so you can interact with blocks behind it. Tags: Transparent, Translucent, Through
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1123f43d684336ff58ee36e2b964b3147fa9134d_0.webp) ## IntangibleItemFrames Makes item frames intangible so you can interact with blocks behind it. You still can interact with frames by pressing shift button. ### Features * Lightweight * Just works * Works on any servers ### Suggestions & Support **Need a specific version support? Or maybe a new feature?**
Send your issue request to [Github Issues](https://github.com/kotleni/intangibleitemframes-minecraft/issues) or email me `yavarenikya@gmail.com`.
